Title: Blades of the Guardians
Writer: Tai-Lee Chan, Chao-Bin Su, Larry Yang
Actors: Jing Wu, Nicholas Tse, Jet Li
Plot: Dao Ma, the "second most wanted fugitive," who is entrusted by his benefactor, the chief of Mo family clan, to take on a mysterious escort mission-escorting the "most wanted fugitive," to Chang'an.
